summary: Webhook Timeline Integration testing complete. All 18 tests pass. Verified end-to-end webhook traceability for both Exely (SOAP XML) and HotelRunner (JSON) webhooks. Timeline events are correctly written at webhook_received, normalized, deduplicated stages for Exely and webhook_received, deduplicated, normalized, validated stages for HotelRunner. Raw payload storage working for both providers. Duplicate detection correctly marks is_duplicate=true on second webhook. Correlation ID propagation verified across all events.
critical_code_review_comments: Exely webhook correctly writes 3 timeline events: webhook_received (with raw_payload_id, hotel_code, source_ip, payload_size_bytes), normalized (with guest_name, checkin, checkout, room_type_code, total_amount, currency, canonical_status), deduplicated (with is_duplicate, is_new, decision)
HotelRunner webhook correctly writes 4 timeline events via ingest pipeline: webhook_received, deduplicated, normalized, validated (with room_mapped, rate_mapped status)
Raw payload storage working correctly - stores full SOAP XML for Exely (text/xml) and full JSON for HotelRunner (application/json)
Duplicate detection working - second webhook for same reservation shows is_duplicate=true, is_new=false in deduplicated stage
Correlation ID propagation verified - all events from single webhook share same correlation_id
HotelRunner uses background_tasks for processing, requires 2-3s sleep before checking timeline
Exely webhook processes synchronously, timeline events available immediately
test_credentials: No auth required for webhook endpoints. Exely uses hotel_code=501694 (demo connection). HotelRunner requires X-Tenant-ID header.
seed_data_creation: Test data created during tests: EXELY-TL-*, EXELY-RAW-*, EXELY-DUP-*, HR-TL-*, HR-RAW-*, HR-DUP-* reservations with timeline events and raw payloads
context_for_next_testing_agent: Webhook Timeline Integration (Phase 5 extension) is complete and tested. 18 API tests in test_webhook_timeline_integration.py cover: Exely webhook (6 tests: health, info, new reservation timeline, raw payload storage, duplicate detection, metadata), HotelRunner webhook (3 tests: new reservation timeline, raw payload storage, duplicate detection), Timeline API endpoints (6 tests: external_id lookup, raw payloads by external_id, raw payload by correlation_id, search with stage filter, search with provider filter, gaps detection), Correlation ID propagation (2 tests: Exely, HotelRunner), Validated stage metadata (1 test). Key tenant_id for testing: 044f122b-87b5-480a-88b4-b9534b0c8c90. Exely hotel_code: 501694.
verified_endpoints: POST /api/channel-manager/hotelrunner/webhooks/reservations - JSON reservation webhook with timeline
GET /api/ops/timeline/external/{external_id} - Primary debug entry point (returns timeline array)
GET /api/ops/timeline/raw-payloads/by-external/{external_id} - All raw payloads for reservation
GET /api/ops/timeline/raw-payload/{correlation_id} - Single raw payload by correlation
